ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., goals, assists, tackles) */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the performance data was recorded */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the performance data was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., official match data, training sessions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES clubs ("league"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soccer position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer position (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soccer position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of skills required for the position */,
  "common_metrics" TEXT /* Common performance metrics used to evaluate players in this position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Up to 23, 23-29, 30+) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Historical data on player injuries */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the club expires */,
  "transfer_value" REAL /* Estimated transfer value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soccer club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer club */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the club competes */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the club's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "current_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)
